description: Tools for reading the current authenticated user's profile. The Vibe Booking AI agent uses these to personalize interactions — checking the user's name, preferred language, loyalty balance, and student status.

tools.name: get_current_user_profile
tools.description: Get the full profile of the currently authenticated user including name, email, preferred language, emergency contacts, role, student status, and loyalty points balance. Use at the start of a conversation to personalize greetings and understand the user's context.
tools.returns: User object with id, email, name, phone, avatar_url, preferred_language (EN|ZH|KM), role (USER|ADMIN), email_verified, student_status (NONE|PENDING|VERIFIED|REJECTED), loyalty_balance (points)
